questions.question: Before karaoke, this acclaimed oboist and music executive hosted a TV series where the audience and viewers at home sang along to the music.
What designer relaunched her fashion house with bold new designs for women, including a tailored suit and two-tone shoes?
Name the jazz pianist and innovator known for his work with his Quartet and Trio, performing classic pieces "The Duke" and "Take Five."
What chunky cartridges were first introduced in 1964, and then used in cars in 1965?
What famous sign-off on the Huntley-Brinkley Report became a catchphrase?
